name: reviewers
description: Codex-ready handoff skills and bundled reviewer files from Agent Workshop.

interface.shortDescription: Review and PR handoff skills for Codex.
interface.longDescription: A Codex manifest for the Agent Workshop reviewers plugin. Codex exposes the handoff-review and handoff-pr skills from this package; the reviewer agent files are bundled in the payload for Claude Code and reference, but Codex standalone custom agents still need repo-local .codex/agents wrappers.
defaultPrompt: Explain how to install reviewer agents for Codex.
